name: s2-administrasi-publik-website
description: Modern academic website for the Master of Public Administration study program.

scripts.copy:assets: mkdir -p dist/img dist/icons && cp -R public/img/. dist/img/ && cp -R public/icons/. dist/icons/ && cp src/js/main.js dist/app.js
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist/img dist/icons && cp -R public/img/. dist/img/ && cp -R public/icons/. dist/icons/ && cp src/js/main.js dist/app.js && tailwindcss -i ./src/css/input.css -o ./dist/output.css --watch
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/img dist/icons && cp -R public/img/. dist/img/ && cp -R public/icons/. dist/icons/ && cp src/js/main.js dist/app.js && tailwindcss -i ./src/css/input.css -o ./dist/output.css --minify
